en_title: Guild Wars 3 Officially Revealed, Beta Starts Fall 2027 For ArenaNet's Next MMORPG
cn_title: 《激战3》正式公布，2027年秋季开启Beta测试
subtitle: 经典重启
opus_summary: ArenaNet在夏日游戏节公布《激战3》，动作MMORPG，强调跑酷与动量战斗，故事设定在泰瑞亚欧尔地区，时间线早于初代一千年，Beta测试2027年秋季启动。

paragraphs.en: As part of the Summer Game Fest showcase, developer ArenaNet officially revealed the next entry in its long-running MMORPG series with Guild Wars 3. It'll be an action-style RPG with a focus on traversal, using momentum for combat, and branching skillsets and customization, all while being tuned for keyboard-mouse controls and gamepad.
paragraphs.cn: 在夏日游戏节上，开发商ArenaNet正式公布了其长期运营的MMORPG系列新作《激战3》。本作将是一款动作RPG，注重跑酷移动、利用动量进行战斗，并拥有分支技能树与自定义系统，同时针对键鼠和手柄操作进行了优化。

paragraphs.en: The reveal trailer opens with the player character known as the Vaelwarden riding a majestic wolf-like mount and scaling up cliffs on foot. It also teased its world, which is set in the Tyrian region of Orr, which looks expansive, and you'll be responsible for protecting and preserving nature and spirits amid conflict between the world's guilds. Guild Wars 3 takes place a thousand years before the first entry, and there are new magical elements like Vael spirits and the Seeker who connect you to the land, adnt the trailer teased that you can play with a party of four. You can watch the trailer below.
paragraphs.cn: 预告片开场，玩家角色Vaelwarden骑着一只威严的狼形坐骑，并徒步攀爬悬崖。预告还展示了游戏世界——设定在泰瑞亚的欧尔地区，看起来广阔无垠，玩家将负责在各大公会之间的冲突中保护自然与灵魂。《激战3》的故事发生在初代的一千年前，新增了Vael灵魂和Seeker等魔法元素，将玩家与大地相连。预告片还暗示玩家可以组成四人小队。以下为预告片。

paragraphs.en: Studio head Colin Johanson said, "Our approach with Guild Wars 3 is to push MMORPGs forward, to create an online game world that feels believable, rewarding, responsive, and innovative while at the same time respecting players’ time and providing a positive, supportive space to build community and enjoy new stories in our universe."
paragraphs.cn: 工作室负责人Colin Johanson表示：「我们在《激战3》中的目标是推动MMORPG向前发展，创造一个可信、有回报、响应迅速且富有创新的在线游戏世界，同时尊重玩家的时间，提供一个积极、支持性的空间，让玩家建立社区并享受我们宇宙中的新故事。」

paragraphs.en: Michael Higham is an editor at IGN who regularly contributes with reviews, previews, features, and news in written and video form. He's usually entrusted with covering long RPGs and tech products, but he's got range when it comes to games. You'll also catch him at events and hosting video content, including IGN's weekly podcast Unlocked .
paragraphs.cn: Michael Higham是IGN的编辑，经常以文字和视频形式撰写评测、预览、专题和新闻。他通常负责长篇RPG和科技产品的报道，但在游戏领域涉猎广泛。你还会在活动现场看到他主持视频内容，包括IGN的每周播客《Unlocked》。
